title: mini completion shell script
goal: Add a 'mini completion <bash|zsh>' subcommand that prints a shell completion script for the CLI, completing top-level command names and common flags; verifiable via snapshot tests of the generated script.

steps.title: Completion script renderer
steps.detail: Pure module src/completion/render.ts: SHELLS list, isShell guard, renderCompletion(shell, { binName, commands }) returning a bash/zsh completion script that completes top-level mini command names (with a generic file fallback for further args). No side effects, snapshot-friendly.

steps.title: completion command + CLI wiring
steps.detail: src/commands/completion.ts validates the shell and writes the script to stdout (unknown shell -> clear error + exit 1); register program.command('completion <shell>') in cli.ts, deriving command names from program.commands (skipping hidden ones like check-version) and passing them to the renderer.

steps.title: Tests, docs, wrap-up
steps.detail: Snapshot tests for bash and zsh output plus the unknown-shell error path; add docs/completion.md and a short README note (source <(mini completion bash)); run typecheck and the full test suite.
